🎓 CampusConnect

Connecting Students, Admins & HRs in One Place

About CampusConnect

CampusConnect is a centralized platform designed for students, university administrators, and HRs to stay connected. Post internships, view placements, download notes, read notices, join events, and more — all from one portal.

Features

  • 📢 View latest campus notices
  • 📝 Download notes & resources
  • 🎯 Find placement updates
  • 💼 HRs post internship opportunities
  • 👤 Role-based access: Student / Admin / HR
Login Register
